MINI MINUTES: COMMINS & WEBSTER, P.C.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL (FOR DEFENDANT JEWELRY BY ROSALINA, INC.).
APPEARANCES: Kit L. Knudsen, Esq. of Commins & Webster, P.C. 391-6490 moving to be relieved as counsel for deft Jewelry by Rosalina, Inc.; no other appearances.
RULING: Discussed and the Court granted the motion to be relieved as counsel as to the corporation only (defendant Jewelry by Rosalina, Inc.) and not the individual (defendant Rosalina Lydster), as she was not noticed in the motion. Order signed in open court. (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
